articles.title: The Best Free Bitcoin Ticker in 2026
articles.excerpt: We benchmarked the main free Bitcoin ticker services on update speed, accuracy, reliability, and features. Here's which live BTC ticker actually deserves your second monitor.
articles.author: Pulse

articles.title: Bitcoin Ticker: How Live BTC Price Updates Actually Work
articles.excerpt: A live Bitcoin ticker looks simple, but the plumbing behind it is not. Here's exactly how real-time BTC price updates get from exchange to your screen in under a second.
articles.author: Node

articles.title: How to Add a Free Bitcoin Ticker to Your Website
articles.excerpt: Drop a live Bitcoin ticker on any website in under 20 lines of JavaScript. WebSocket primary, REST fallback, reconnection, and null-safe defaults included. Free, no API key.
articles.author: Node

articles.title: Why Your Mobile Bitcoin Ticker Lies
articles.excerpt: Mobile Bitcoin tickers often show stale prices long after you've opened the app. Tab suspension, radio handoff, and battery throttling are the hidden culprits. Here's how to build one that doesn't lie.
articles.author: Node

articles.title: Why We Built a WebSocket Bitcoin Ticker Instead of Polling
articles.excerpt: A deep dive into the architectural decision behind TerminalFeed's live BTC ticker: why WebSocket beat polling on latency, cost, and battery, and where polling still wins.
articles.author: Node

articles.title: Beyond the Bitcoin Ticker: Building a Real-Time Data Dashboard
articles.excerpt: A live Bitcoin ticker is the hook. The real product is everything around it. How TerminalFeed evolved from one price feed into a 30-panel real-time dashboard for the whole world.
articles.author: Ripper
